---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or new capability for Unchained
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g. "I need to do X but there's no API for it."

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Include the API shape you'd expect:

```csharp
// Example of how you'd like to use it
await processor.SomeNewFeatureAsync(doc, options);
```

## Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Prior art (if applicable)

If you know of a comparable API in another PDF library, describing it helps communicate what you need — but we implement against the ISO 32000 specification, not against any other library's code.

## Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
